title: Fix glow GL-state leak; faithful headless harness
description: Span-glow rendered glitchy in the live widget (flickering white) because femtovg's background capture left GL_BLEND on with garbage in the FBO, and the glow shader pass blended over it. Fix: ShaderPass::render now disables blending and clears the FBO before drawing (deterministic state). The offscreen harness missed it because render_content didn't run femtovg before the glow; made it faithful (runs the femtovg bg layer first, like the live path) so this class of GL-state bug reproduces headless. Exposed composite_rgba. Recorded the verify-headless-first + demo-at-bottom habits in AGENTS.md.

title: Span-level glow effect + shader cache
description: Span-level GPU shader effects: a ShaderCache (compile-once by key) plus a built-in glow shader. The <glow color=> custom tag renders a soft pulsing GPU halo behind a text span, positioned via the Pango layout (markup::process -> span_rect) and composited behind the text. Establishes the span-shader seam (cache threaded into draw_content via EffectCtx) that user per-span <shader src> will reuse. paint_rgba_at composites at a span offset; EFFECT_TAGS gains glow; lib.rs merges the two draw layers under one GL context. Validated offscreen and live waybar (conditional glow via {% if %}).
close_reason: Implemented + vision-validated (offscreen + live waybar conditional glow). 26 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.

title: Data-reactive shader uniforms
description: shader_uniforms config maps float uniform names to templates evaluated against the tile data (true/false to 1/0, else parsed as float); resolved each refresh and fed to the background shader, so the GPU shader reacts to live data. content.rs build_uniforms (pure, unit-tested) stored in TileContent; shader.rs ShaderPass::render sets named float uniforms; lib.rs passes the content uniforms through. examples/shaders/reactive.glsl + render_shader name=value args. Validated offscreen (calm teal at u_load=0.08 vs intense red at 0.95) and live waybar (load value drives the shader red).
close_reason: Implemented + vision-validated (offscreen low/high + live waybar). 26 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.

title: Tile-level GPU background shaders (Shadertoy-style)
description: background_shader config points at a Shadertoy-style GLSL fragment shader (defines mainImage) rendered on our own GL context into a texture with iResolution/iTime/iFrame, read back, and composited as the tile background; Pango content draws on top. Hot-reloaded on file mtime change; compile errors logged. Animated when fps>0 or a shader is set. New src/shader.rs (glow), examples/render_shader + examples/shaders/aurora.glsl. Data-driven uniforms are the fast-follow. Validated offscreen + live waybar (animated shader behind a data-bound clock).
close_reason: Implemented + vision-validated (offscreen frame + live waybar). 25 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.

title: Data-bound tile templates (minijinja + JSON data)
description: Tile content is now a data-bound template: exec emits JSON (the data model), and  is a minijinja template (Jinja {{ }}/{% %}) rendered against it into Pango markup, with HTML/XML autoescape so bound values are markup-safe. Object fields bind at top level ({{ cpu.pct }}); non-object data is {{ value }}. Filters + conditionals enable in-template formatting/state styling; data can also carry colors. Replaces the {} substituter and the deferred jq in one crate. markup::render_template (pure, unit-tested); content.rs parse_data+build_markup; examples/render_data vision harness. Validated in real waybar (JSON clock tile).
close_reason: Implemented + vision-validated (offscreen dashboard + live waybar). 24 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.

title: Rich content: Pango markup + extensible custom effect tags
description: Tile content is now Pango markup (per-span color/size/weight/font, multiline) rendered via PangoCairo over the femtovg GPU layer. Custom effect tags routed away from Pango (markup::process, pure+unit-tested) and drawn by our renderer positioned via Pango span extents; <box> highlight implemented as the proof effect. Orchestrated via 2 subagents (markup router; Pango text renderer) + lead integration. Vision-tested offscreen (render_text, render_content) + live waybar.
close_reason: Implemented + vision-validated in real waybar. 22 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean. Effect seam proven (<box>); shaders/glow are the documented next step.

title: Tile content/data model (static + exec sources)
description: Foundational feature: tiles get content from a static text or a command re-run on an interval (non-blocking background thread + thread-safe ContentStore + dirty-flag poll). format template, icon glyph, multiline. New src/content.rs; config fields text/exec/interval/icon/format; TextTile in tile.rs; render/lib wiring. Validated in real waybar (live clock tile, multiline, transparent on translucent bar).
close_reason: Implemented + validated in real waybar; 8 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.

title: Headless screenshot harness for waybar module
description: Offscreen capture harness mirroring demo-fyre, adapted for a real waybar loading libpwetty_box.so. Stack: cage(headless, LIBSEAT_BACKEND=noop) -> niri(winit) -> waybar(cffi/pwetty) -> grim. Critical safety: LIBSEAT_BACKEND=noop prevents libseat from contacting logind, so it cannot steal the active seat (validated: cage-alone run left niri --session PID unchanged). Files under test/.
close_reason: Offscreen software render harness delivered: examples/render_tile.rs renders the tile via surfaceless EGL+femtovg to PNG (validated at t=0.6/2.0/7.5s, animated gradient + multiline text). Live-waybar harness defused (removed pkill niri) and marked DANGER.

title: Scaffold waybar CFFI shader/canvas widget (Rust cdylib)
description: Scaffold a Rust cdylib that loads as a waybar CFFI module and renders multiline text/icon tiles. Stack: waybar-cffi (GTK3), GtkGLArea + epoxy for the GL context, femtovg OpenGl renderer for canvas/text/icons. Constraint discovered: waybar v0.15 is GTK3 (GtkContainer* root), GL via GtkGLArea is the only zero-copy GPU surface; Vulkan not reachable in-widget. Scaffold must: build to .so, load in waybar, run an animated render loop on GtkGLArea via femtovg, plumb JSON config, expose a clean Tile abstraction seam, and ship a README with build + waybar config.
